title: Senior Instructional Designer at LinkedIn Learning India

jsonLd.title: Senior Instructional Designer at LinkedIn Learning India
jsonLd.description:
LinkedIn Learning India, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Instructional Designer for our Ghaziabad operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About LinkedIn Learning India:
LinkedIn Learning India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Student Assessment

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Flexible working hours
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with LinkedIn Learning India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
